request.description:
Creates a new document with an initial version (v1). A slug is auto-generated from the title.

**Required:** `knowledge_base_category_id`, `title`, `content`

**Content formats:** `markdown`, `html`, `plain`

**Auth:** `knowledge_base.manage` permission required.

**Response:** `201 Created`
```json
{ "data": DocumentData, "message": "Knowledge base document created." }
```
